phrases.intent_en: Ask which local wine to try
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿qué vino local me recomienda probar?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, keh BEE-no lo-KAL me re-ko-MEN-da pro-BAR?

likely_response.local: Pruebe nuestro Bobal de la DO Utiel-Requena, fresco.
likely_response.pronunciation: proo-EH-beh noo-EH-stroh boh-BAHL DEH LAH DOH oo-tee-EHL reh-k-EH-nah FREH-skoh
likely_response.translation_en: Try the Utiel-Requena, it is our local red wine.

responses.english: Try the Utiel-Requena, it is our local red wine.
responses.phonetic: proo-EH-beh noo-EH-stroh boh-BAHL DEH LAH DOH oo-tee-EHL reh-k-EH-nah FREH-skoh
responses.local: Pruebe nuestro Bobal de la DO Utiel-Requena, fresco.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if they accept card payment
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿aceptan pagos con tarjeta de crédito?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, ah-sep-TAHN pah-GOHS con tar-HAH-tah deh KREH-dee-toh?

likely_response.local: Sí, aceptamos tarjetas sobre cierto monto.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ ah-thehp-TAH-mohs tahr-HEH-tahs SOHB-reh thee-EHR-toh MOHN-toh
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, we accept cards over a certain amount.

responses.english: Yes, we accept cards over a certain amount.
responses.phonetic: SÍ ah-thehp-TAH-mohs tahr-HEH-tahs SOHB-reh thee-EHR-toh MOHN-toh
responses.local: Sí, aceptamos tarjetas sobre cierto monto.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo hacer el pedido de tapas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DON-deh PWEH-doh ah-THER el peh-DEE-doh deh TAH-pahs?

likely_response.local: En la barra, pida directamente al camarero.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH BAHR-rah PEE-dah dee-rehth-tah-MEHN-teh AHL kah-mah-REH-roh
likely_response.translation_en: At the bar, ask the waiter directly.

responses.english: At the bar, ask the waiter directly.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH BAHR-rah PEE-dah dee-rehth-tah-MEHN-teh AHL kah-mah-REH-roh
responses.local: En la barra, pida directamente al camarero.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the house specialty is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cuál es la especialidad de la casa?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, kwahl es lah eh-speh-syah-lee-DAHD deh lah KAH-sah?

likely_response.local: La paella valenciana es la especialidad, se sirve al mediodía.
likely_response.pronunciation: LAH pah-EHL-lah bah-lehn-thee-AH-nah EHS LAH eh-speh-thee-ah-lee-DAHD SEH SEER-beh AHL meh-dee-oh-DÍ-ah
likely_response.translation_en: The Valencian paella is the specialty, served at noon.

responses.english: The Valencian paella is the specialty, served at noon.
responses.phonetic: LAH pah-EHL-lah bah-lehn-thee-AH-nah EHS LAH eh-speh-thee-ah-lee-DAHD SEH SEER-beh AHL meh-dee-oh-DÍ-ah
responses.local: La paella valenciana es la especialidad, se sirve al mediodía.
